import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { Card } from "@/components/ui/card"; import { GraduationCap, Mail, Phone, Building2, Users, ShieldCheck, } from "lucide-react"; const LandingPage = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); return (
{/* BRANDING */}

Smart-M Hub

A complete digital school management platform for administration, academics, finance, communication, attendance, examinations, portals, and institutional operations.

{/* FEATURES */}

School Administration

Manage students, teachers, finance, attendance, examinations and communication from one dashboard.

Multi-User Portals

Dedicated portals for school admins, teachers, finance staff, secretaries, students and parents.

Secure Invite System

Schools control access using invite codes, approval systems and role-based onboarding.

{/* CONTACT */}

support@smartmhub.com

+254 700 000 000

{/* ACTIONS */}
{/* SCHOOL ADMIN ONLY */} {/* FUTURE INVITE SYSTEM */} {/* LOGIN */}
{/* FOOTNOTE */}
School administrators register institutions once. All other users join using school invite links or school codes.
); }; export default LandingPage;
